title: My Big TOE — The Complete Trilogy (Thomas Campbell)
subtitle: A consciousness-first theory of everything: reality as virtual reality, individuated consciousness units, and the evolution toward higher consciousness

summary.one_line: Campbell's My Big TOE (Theory of Everything) posits that consciousness is fundamental, physical reality is a virtual reality (PMR), and individuated units of consciousness evolve through interactio...
summary.scope: Covers the three books of the trilogy: (1) Awakening — the discovery of the larger reality and the nature of consciousness; (2) Discovery — the mechanics of the virtual reality, the LCS, and the evolution of consciousness; (3) Inner Workings — the technical details of how the system operates, including the nature of time, causality, and the purpose of existence.

sources.label: Thomas Campbell — My Big TOE: The Complete Trilogy (Lightning Strike Books, 2003-2007). PDF, 820 pages, scanned.

body.text: Campbell's first principle: consciousness is the sole ontological primitive. Physical matter reality (PMR) is a virtual reality — a training simulation generated by the Larger Consciousness System (LCS). Individuated units of consciousness (IUOCs) are fragments of the LCS that enter PMR to evolve. This maps directly to Tantraloka's Siva (pure consciousness) as substrate, with the 36 tattvas as the virtual reality layers. The difference: Campbell's simulation is informational (a digital VR), while Tantraloka's manifestation is ontological (consciousness expressing as itself).

Campbell posits that love and truth are natural laws of the larger reality, not moral conventions. Truth is alignment with what is; love is the force that drives evolution toward unity. In Tantraloka terms, truth is prakasa (the light of consciousness illuminating what is), and love is vimarsa (consciousness's self-awareness as unity). The daimon path's 'one rule' (every paragraph is kind) and the Tantraloka's samatavrata (the pure vow of equality) are structural homologues.

The purpose of PMR is evolution through interaction. IUOCs enter the simulation, face challenges, make choices, and the data generated by these choices informs the LCS. This is structurally identical to the karmic update rule: I(n+1) = Psi(P, Kn, e). The IUOC is the navigator; PMR is L3 (biological navigability); the LCS is S0. The 'quality' of the IUOC's choices (alignment with love/truth) determines its position in the larger system. In Tantraloka terms, this is the sattva/rajas/tamas classification — the gunas as the quality of the configuration's alignment with its source.

gaps: Full extraction requires OCR — 820 scanned pages.

versions.summary: Initial RO for Campbell's My Big TOE trilogy.
